# tfe_hyok_encrypted_data_key

This data source can be used to retrieve a HYOK customer key version.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the HYOK encrypted data key.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the key version was created.
- `customer_key_name` (String) The customer provided name of the HYOK encrypted data key.
- `encrypted_dek` (String) The encrypted data encryption key of the HYOK encrypted data key.
